item.title: Blog | Random musing on Jetpack Compose
item.content:encoded: Compose is a new reactive-style ui framework for android. After poking around in the source code, there are some interesting architectural decisions I would like to highlight: ...
item.author: evan.tatarka@willowtreeapps.com (Evan Tatarka)

item.title: Blog | The Mess that is Android Biometrics
item.content:encoded: Oh FingerprintManager is deprecated? It’s replaced with this new thing BiometricPrompt that comes with it’s own UI and supports a wider range of biometrics? There’s even an androidx library that does the compatibility work for you? This will be easy! HAHAHAHHAHHAHA ...
item.author: evan.tatarka@willowtreeapps.com (Evan Tatarka)

item.title: Blog | Some More Biometric Messes
item.content:encoded: This is a follow-up to The Mess that is Android Biometrics, as we found even more wonderful surprises. ...
item.author: evan.tatarka@willowtreeapps.com (Evan Tatarka)

item.title: Blog | You Don't Need to Null Out Views
item.content:encoded: There's been a long standing footgun when using fragments on Android because the fragment may live longer than it's views. Solutions to this have ranged from ignoring the problem to some complicated rxjava setup. However, with the additions to AndroidX this is no longer necessary! ...
item.author: evan.tatarka@willowtreeapps.com (Evan Tatarka)
